question: [File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/middleware/metrics.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: MetricsMiddleware()] Can an unprivileged external user flood the Rosetta API with concurrent long-running HTTP requests to saturate the `requestInflightGauge` and exhaust goroutine/thread resources, causing block-processing handlers to stall for 500%+ of average block time, effectively freezing transaction finalization?
